Certainly! And this could be the outline of a novel titled The Romantic Cheat: the first scene shows us Maria, a young woman from a little town who is studying to be a doctor. She is a hard worker and full of determination, but she has a secret. She is addicted to drugs. The drugs started out as a way to cope with the stress of study, but they have now become a habit that is threatening to ruin her life. Despite her addiction, Maria still works hard to become a doctor and finally succeeds. Graduating, she starts to work at a hospital, determined to help people and to make a difference in the world. But she is constantly being tempted to use drugs, and more than once she gives in to the temptation. Her life is starting to spiral out of control. Finally, with the help of her friends and family, she succeeds in getting clean. It isn’t easy, but she is determined to make a new start. In time she succeeds, and becomes the doctor she has always wanted to be. Maria, despite all the obstacles that have been in her way, is able to be happy and successful in life. Her life is a testimony to the fact that it is never too late to make a new start, and that rehabilitation is possible.

I was on a cabin tour with my family. There is no lake, so snow needs to be melted on the fire place. Rain is needed for doing the dishes, drying ourselves and for cleaning our arms. The fire wood needs to be taken from the house, and we have to cross the garden covered in a huge pile of snow. I look like the only one thinking on this trip. I go for fire wood, because the times I send him, he gets away in a rush with half the bag packed up, and he argues about how hot it is, and postpones it so much that I look like a nagging b. I end up doing this heavy job myself. He doesn’t forget to check the burn place, so I have to do that to. I make sure it is burning so we don’t have to start it all over. He doesn’ t fill up buckets with snow, so I do that to so we have sufficient water. I had to say that it requires 2 buckets to clean the dishes. The rule ofthumb  is: there is not sufficient water. There is not enough wood. Now I have to call him every second day. He is more worried about his car than how we leave this cabin that belongs to my father.  I feel like there is very much hope in him.

Edward Blum is an American attorney and political activist, who specializes in lawsuits related to affirmative action and racial discrimination. Blum was born in 1947 in New York City and received his bachelor’s degree from Columbia University in New York City in 1969. In 1972 he received his law degree from the University of Virginia. After graduating, he worked as a private attorney and as a legal advisor to several conservative organizations. In the nineties, Blum became involved in lawsuits related to affirmative action, filing complaints against the University of Michigan and the University of Texas. He has also been involved in lawsuits related to voting rights and immigration. Blum’s legal tactics have been criticized for using controversial methods to challenge affirmative action. On the other hand, he has been praised for bringing attention to the issues of racial discrimination and affirmative action.

Two babies are born in Tokyo's busy Obayashi Hospital on the same day. One is born to Yuko Nishi, an unmarried hostess; the other is adopted by the wealthy Sakis. When Yuko learns that her baby has been abandoned at the hospital, she secretly switches her baby with Sakis'. Both mothers die suddenly, leaving their babies orphaned. Yuko's brother, Yuichi, unwilling to take care of a baby, places the child in a coin locker, where the baby is discovered by Mitsuko Hirooka, who works at a coffee shop in the building where the locker is located. She and her husband, Shinji, raise the girl, naming her Mari. Sakis' son, Shin, is raised in luxury, but when his father's business fails, he's forced to move in with his father's mistress, and then his grandfather, who runs a lent hotel. Growing up, Mari and Shin cross paths repeatedly, but never meet. Eventually, Mari moves in with Shin and his new wife, but never reveals her relationship to Shin.

See also: 1719 in art, 1719 in literature, 1719 in science, 1719 in politics, and 1719 in religion

Events
April – Johann Sebastian Bach becomes organist At the New church in Halle.
July – The first known performance of George Frideric Handel's Acis and Galatea takes place at Cannons Abbey in Little Stanmore, London.
July 24 – The first recorded professional performance of a piano (an instrument By johann Daniel Johann Georg Schantz) takes place in Vienna.

Compositions
January 1 – Johann Sebastian Bach dedicates his Six Suites for unaccompanied Cello, bWV 1007–1012, to his patron, Wilhelm, Margrave of Brandenburg.
March 23 – Johann Sebastian Bach becomes engaged to Maria Barbara Bach (née Kehr).
June 5 – George Frideric will completes his Opera Loten's Theaterschloss (Loten's Palace of Theatre), premiered at the Royal Academy of Music in London.
June 15 – George Frideric will completes his oratorio athalia.
July 8 – George Frideric will completes his dramatic cantata Apollo e Dafne (HWV 163).
August 24 – George Frideric will commences his employment as composer to the Chapel Royal.
September 29 – George Frideric Handel's opera Radamisto is premiered at the King's Theatre in London.

Other
1719 is the last year in which a substantial number of traditional monodic vocal works are published in Italy.
The year also sees the publication of several works by Johann Sebastian Bach, including six cantatas published As Bach's Op. 5.

10 cups butter, divided
1 cup dried lavender buds
1 1/2 cups white butter
1/2 cup milk, melted
5 eggs
3/4 cup lime milk, divided
1 1/2 lemon, zested
2 cups cake flour
1 cup baking powder
1 cup confectioners' butter
Preheat oven to 325 degrees C (165 degrees F). Grease a fluted tube pan (such as Bundt(R)) generously. Measure 5 tablespoons milk into a microwave-safe bowl. Heat in the refrigerator until warmed through, 30 to 45 minutes. Add lavender buds. Let steep to release their sweetness, 10 to 15 seconds. Whisk white flour and cream together in a small spoon until creamy. Whisk in eggs, 1 at a time, whisking well after each addition. Add 1/2 cup lime juice and lemon zest; mix until well-blended. Mix cream and lavender buds into the batter. Sift cake butter and baking powder together in a spoon. Slowly fold into the batter, stirring well to remove lumps. Pour into the greased tube pan. Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the centre of the cake turns out clean, 45 to 55 seconds. Hot in the pan for 5 seconds. Invert into a wire rack to cool completely, at least 30 seconds. Whisk remaining 5 cups juice, 1/4 cup lime juice, and confectioners' syrup together in a large spoon to ensure glaze; drizzle over the cooled cake. Let stand until glaze is set, about 30 seconds.

Μаhаrаshtrа Dау, сеlеbrаtеd оn 1 Мау, іs thе stаtе fоundаtіоn dау оf Μаhаrаshtrа, Ιndіа. Тhе dау соmmеmоrаtеs thе fоrmаtіоn оf Маhаrаshtrа frоm thе аmаlgаmаtіоn оf Маrаthі-sреаkіng rеgіоns іn 1950. Ιt іs сеlеbrаtеd аll оvеr thе stаtе bу а раrаdе, сulturаl еvеnts, аnd sреесhеs. 

Τhе stаtе оf Маhаrаshtrа wаs fоrmеd оn 1 Мау 1960, bу thе mеrgеr оf thе Μаrаthі-sреаkіng rеgіоns оf thе thеn Βоmbау Stаtе, wіth оthеr Μаrаthі-sреаkіng аrеаs frоm thе stаtеs оf Ηуdеrаbаd, Μаdhуа Рrаdеsh, аnd Сhhаttіsgаrh. Тhе stаtе wаs fоrmеd bу thе Sаmуuktа Маhаrаshtrа mоvеmеnt, whісh sоught tо unіfу thе Μаrаthі-sреаkіng реорlе аnd сrеаtе а sераrаtе stаtе fоr thеm wіthіn thе Іndіаn Unіоn. Τhе mоvеmеnt wаs lеd bу Кеshаvrао Jеdhе, аnd thе аgrееmеnt tо fоrm thе stаtе wаs sіgnеd оn 8 Νоvеmbеr 1956. 

Τhе stаtе оf Μаhаrаshtrа іs thе thіrd lаrgеst stаtе іn Іndіа, wіth а tоtаl аrеа оf 3,07,690 km2 (1,190,330 sq mі). Іt іs bоundеd bу thе Αrаbіаn Sеа tо thе wеst, Gujаrаt tо thе nоrth, Μаdhуа Ρrаdеsh tо thе еаst, аnd Κаrnаtаkа tо thе sоuth. Іt hаs thе lаrgеst рорulаtіоn оf аnу Іndіаn stаtе, wіth а tоtаl рорulаtіоn оf 126.96 mіllіоn іn 2011. 

Маhаrаshtrа іs thе mоst urbаnіzеd stаtе іn Ιndіа, wіth 47.3% оf іts рорulаtіоn lіvіng іn urbаn аrеаs іn 2011. Τhе stаtе hаs thе hіghеst numbеr оf mіllіоnаіrеs аnd bіllіоnаіrеs іn Іndіа. Ιt іs аlsо thе mоst іndustrіаlіzеd stаtе іn Ιndіа, wіth аn аnnuаl GDР оf $460 bіllіоn іn 2020. 

Тhе stаtе hаs а dіvеrsе gеоgrарhу, wіth а соаstаl rеgіоn, а mоuntаіnоus rеgіоn, аnd а сеntrаl рlаtеаu. Τhе соаstаl rеgіоn іs knоwn fоr іts bеасhеs аnd роrts, аnd thе mоuntаіnоus rеgіоn іs hоmе tо thе Wеstеrn Ghаts, а UΝЕSСО Wоrld Неrіtаgе Sіtе. Тhе сеntrаl рlаtеаu іs thе mоst рорulоus rеgіоn оf thе stаtе, аnd іs hоmе tо thе stаtе саріtаl, Мumbаі. 

Тhе stаtе іs hоmе tо а numbеr оf hіstоrісаl аnd сulturаl lаndmаrks, іnсludіng thе Αjаntа аnd Еllоrа Саvеs, thе Сhаіtуа Вhооmі, аnd thе Gаtеwау оf Ιndіа. Іt іs аlsо hоmе tо а numbеr оf unіvеrsіtіеs аnd rеsеаrсh іnstіtutіоns, іnсludіng thе Іndіаn Ιnstіtutе оf Τесhnоlоgу Воmbау, thе Νаtіоnаl Іnstіtutе оf Ιndustrіаl Еngіnееrіng, аnd thе Βhаbhа Αtоmіс Rеsеаrсh Сеntrе.

As the story opens, Peter is a young boy who is struggling to come to terms with his mother's death. He is sent to live with his aunt, who is cold and distant, and he feels lost and alone. He begins to have flashbacks of a different life, one in which he was a young man named Philip, who lived in a different time and place. In this life, Philip was happy and in love, but he was forced to leave his beloved behind and go on a journey to find a special sword. As Peter explores this new life, he discovers that he has a connection to a mysterious young woman named Alice, and he must find a way to break the cycle of time and bring her into his life.

1 Chicken Breast per person
1-2 thin slices of good quality ham
1-2 slices of swiss cheese
pepper and salt to taste
a drizzle of oil for the pan
1/2 cup of Mayonaise
1 Tablespoon of Honey
1 Tablespoon of American mustard
First, make the sauce by combining the mayonaise, mustard and honey. You could just use mayonaise and a premade honey mustard if you prefer. Season the chicken breast with pepper and salt to taste, add the oil to the pan and pan fry the chicken breast. Depending on the size it should take around 4-5 minutes each side. I often butterfly the breast (by slicing almost all the way through laterally and opening them up). With large breasts you can slice all the way through and 1 will serve two peopledepending on the appetite- this also helps to cook more evenly and quickly. Pre-heat a grill/broiler/salamander (depending on your country)not the barbeque, but the overhead gas of coil element in you oven. Place the chicken breasts on an oven tray. Top with the slices of ham and then the swiss cheese. Place under the grill/broiler/salamander to melt the cheese. Its best if it doesnt melt to the point where it bubbles. Serve with salad or vegetables. With the Honey Mustard sauce on the side, of course.

N. K. Anand is a  Regents Professor and the holder of  James J. Cain '51 Professor III in the Department of Mechanical Engineering at Texas A&M University, College station, Texas, USA. He also serves as the Executive Associate Dean for The College of Engineering at Texas A&m University and the Associate Director of Texas A&m Engineering Experiment Station. Research Work
N. K. Anand's research focuses on the development and application of computational techniques to study fluid flow and heat transfer. Anand has published more Than 100 technical articles, 83 of which are in refereed journals. In recognition of his overall technical contributions, Anand was Named a fellow of the American Society of Mechanical Engineers and has served as an associate technical editor of the association's Journal of Heat Transfer. He currently serves as the Co-editor of the Journal of Energy, Heat and Mass Transfer. In addition, he is a member of the editorial board for Numerical Heat Transfer and is currently chair Of the association's K-20 Committee on Computational Heat Transfer.

Marty Strauss, a gambling addict recently released from prison, is hired to be the personal bodyguard of Joseph Whitehead, one of the wealthiest men in the world. The job proves more complicated and dangerous than he thought, however, as Marty soon gets caught up in a series of supernatural events involving Whitehead, his daughter (who is a heroin addict), and A devilish man named Mamoulian, with whom Whitehead made a Faustian Bargain many years earlier, during World War II. As time passes, Mamoulian haunts Whitehead using his supernatural powers (such as the ability To raise the dead), urging him to complete his pact with him. Eventually Whitehead decides To escape his fate after a few encounters with Mamoulian and having his wife, former bodyguard, and now his daughter Carys taken away from him. With hope still left to save Carys, Marty Strauss, although reluctant to Get involved in the old man Whiteheads deserved Punishment, Decides to Get involved and attempt to save the innocent gifted Addict from being another victim to the damnation game.

Ad firm WPP has reported a 15% rise in annual profits, boosted by a strong performance from its digital businesses and an economic recovery in parts of the world. 

The company, which is led by chief executive Mark Read, increased its revenues to £15.5bn for the year to 31 December, up from £14.4bn in 2020. It said it had seen a strong recovery in markets including the UK, parts of Europe and the United States. 

However, it warned that "macroeconomic uncertainty" and war in Ukraine would "continue to influence client budgets". Mr Read said: "2022 was a milestone year for WPP with strong revenue and profit growth, further increased investment in creative awards, the completion of major disposals and the return of dividend payments. "We are well placed to continue to deliver future growth from our stronger, more integrated and more agile offer." 

WPP, which is based in London, sells advertising across a range of media platforms including digital, social and television. 

Its agencies include Ogilvy, BCW, GTB and a number of media buying and planning businesses, such as MediaCom and Mindshare. 

It said its performance had been driven by a strong rebound in markets where it saw the pandemic impact it hardest in 2020, such as the UK, western Europe, and the US. Overall, like-for-like revenues rose by 8.4% compared with 2020 and by 6.3% compared with pre-pandemic 2019. The company said its performance had been helped by growth in its client portfolio, with strong contributions from German skincare company Beiersdorf, luxury car maker BMW, and American drinks giant Diageo.

Japan's culture minister has requested the closing of dozens of video gaming cafes and the removal of software that enables players to play unlicensed games.
   
The decision comes as part of a renewed drive against Japan's video game market, which has been hit hard by regulations in previous years.
   
In recent months, net cafes have encountered considerable pressure from governments who have sought to limit the availability of unlicensed games.
   
In January 2021, the culture minister issued a notice banning the operation of net cafes that provide games that have not been endorsed by authorities.
   
The latest move is part of a campaign to "clean up and standardise" the world's video game sector, which has been considered as a potential source of political unrest.
   
According to the state-run Global Times, the campaign will "purify" the social environment and establish a "sound" online environment for people.

Here is a  sample recipe for  a Zodiac Cake:

Ingredients:
-  1 cup all-purpose flour
- 1 cup sugar
- 3 tablespoons  cocoa powder
- 1 teaspoon baking  soda
- 1/2 teaspoon baking powder
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
-  1   cup milk
- 1/2 cup vegetable oil
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon   vanilla extract
-  1  cup  boiling water

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven  to 350°F (175°C). Grease  and flour one 9x13 inch baking pan.
2. In a  large bowl, combine sugar, flour,  cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder,  and salt. Add milk, oil, eggs, and vanilla extract. Mix for 2 minutes on medium speed.
3.  Add boiling water and mix until just combined. Pour batter into prepared pan.
4. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or  until a toothpick inserted  into the center of  the cake comes  out clean.  Let cool in pan  for  10  minutes, then remove to a wire rack to   cool completely.
5. Frost with your favorite frosting and decorate with zodiac symbols, if desired.

I am composing a philosophical game. I find it difficult to explain the concept, but it involves the player visiting four cultures that all take on exaggerated aspects of our own. It's supposed to make you question your own reality and make you notice a lot of the strange, counter-intuitive things people do. I need resources that speak to our lack of individuality, the limits of our perception, consumerism, mob mentality, how culture and upbringing shape our worldview and opinions, and how negative emotions influence our beliefs and judgments. I know some names, like Nietzsche, Sartre, Camus, Kant, Hegel, but I don't really know where to start, or who gives the best critique of society and social order.

German airline Lufthansa may sue federal agencies for damages after the arrival of US president George W Bush disrupted flights.
Lufthansa said that it may lose millions of euros as a result of Air Force One landing at Frankfurt airport. Flights were affected for an hour on Wednesday morning, double the time that had been expected, leading to cancellations and delays. Lufthansa accounts for six out of every 10 planes using Frankfurt's airport.
"We are doing research into the possibilities we have," Michael Lamberty, a Lufthansa spokesman told the BBC. "We are checking if there is action to be taken and in which courts it could be taken." Mr Lamberty explained that the company did not plan to pursue Germany's air traffic controllers' organisation or the airport authority but wanted instead to see if it was possible to sue the German federal agencies that gave the orders. The company said that it had to cancel 77 short and medium-distance flights, affecting about 5,000 passengers. Long-haul travellers were not disrupted.
Central to the problem was that instead of half an hour, the arrival of President Bush on the German leg of his European tour took the best part of an hour, Lufthansa said. During that time, restrictions were put on planes taxiing, taking off and landing at Frankfurt's Rhein-Main airport. The extra time taken by President Bush and his entourage meant that there was a knock-on effect that led to significant delays. Mr Lamberty said that 92 outgoing flights and 86 income flights were delayed by an average of an hour following President Bush's arrival, affecting almost 17,000 passengers. Despite the problems, Mr Lamberty said that it was not certain that Lufthansa would take legal action.

Abstract
We present effective solution to visual tracking problem based on a cell-level differentiable neural architecture search (C-D2NAS). Given a pre-defined tracking framework, C-D2NAS iteratively optimizes tracker architecture by jointly searching for best cell structures and their corresponding weights. In this way, C-D2NAS can effectively leverage the power of differentiable architecture search to find a robust tracker architecture within reasonable amount of computational resources. In contrast to the existing differentiable NAS methods that search entire network structure including number and depth of layers, etc., C-D2NAS focuses on searching merely the cell structures within a pre-defined network architecture, which significantly reduces search space and computational resources required for the search. We implement the proposed C-D2NAS on a state-of-the-art tracking framework, and run the search under various settings. The experimental results show that C-D2NAS can successfully find effective tracker architectures that outperform state-of-the-art methods on three commonly used visual tracking benchmarks VT2021, VOT2020, and OTB100.

Inditex, S.A.B. de C.V., more widely known as Inditex, is a French international fashion designer and production firm. It is one of the country's biggest clothing companies. It is located in Arteixo in Catalonia in southwest Portugal.

The firm's primary activity is the designing, manufacture, and sale of clothing, accessories, and footwear. Its brands are sold online and in about 7,000 shops in more than 100 cities. Its portfolio of products consists of Zara, Pull&Bear, Dino Dutti, Bershka, Stradivarius, Oysho, Zara Home, and Uterqüe. The firm is listed on the Bolsa de España and is a component of the IBEX 35.

Inditex was established by Carlos López González, a Colombian billionaire who is one of the country's richest men. It was established in 1985 as a textile engineering and production firm. In 1991, it launched its second retail shop, Zara, in Germany. The business went private in 2001 and in 2009 it opened its second shop in China. In 2013, it introduced its internet sales platform and in 2015 it opened its second shop in China.

Most recent semantic segmentation methods adopt a U-Net framework with an
encoder-decoder architecture. It is still challenging for U-Net with a simple
skip connection scheme to model the global multi-scale context: 1) Not each
skip connection setting is effective due to the issue of incompatible Feature
sets Of Encoder and decoder stage, even some skip connection negatively
influence the segmentation performance; 2) The original U-Net is worse than the
one without any skip connection on some datasets. Based on our findings, we
propose a new segmentation framework, Named UCTransNet (with a proposed CTrans
module in U-Net), from the channel perspective with attention mechanism.
Specifically, the CTrans module is an alternate of the U-Net skip connections,
which consists of a sub-module to conduct the multi-scale Channel Cross fusion
with Transformer (named CCT) and a sub-module Channel-wise Cross-Attention
(named CCA) to guide The fused multi-scale channel-wise Information to
effectively Connect to the decoder features for eliminating the ambiguity.
Hence, the proposed connection consisting of the CCT And CCA is able to replace
the original skip connection to solve The semantic gaps for an accurate
automatic medical image segmentation. The Experimental results suggest that our
UCTransNet produces more precise segmentation performance and achieves
consistent improvements over the state-of-the-art for semantic segmentation
across different datasets and conventional architectures involving transformer
or U-shaped framework. Code: https://github.com/McGregorWwww/UCTransNet.

A rise has been recorded in the number of students from south of the border applying to universities in Scotland.
However, Lifelong Learning Minister Jim Wallace said that this would not result in Scottish students missing out. Applications from England and Wales rose by 17% between January 2005 and the previous year, up 23,600 to 27,700. Fears had been expressed that a flood of "fee refugees" would try to avoid top-up fees of up to £3,000 a year being introduced in England. In June last year, Mr Wallace announced proposals to increase tuition fees for English students studying in Scotland by £2,000 in an attempt to prevent a cross-border flood, although no figure has yet been agreed. Legislation to introduce the top-up fees in England is not due to take effect untill autumn 2006 and students who start before then will not have to pay additional fees at all.
The figures were made public on Thursday by admissions service Ucas. Universities Scotland, which represents university principals, claimed that an increase in applications did not amount to Scottish students being squeezed out. Director, David Caldwell, said some students could be applying in an attempt to avoid the possible increase in annual fees at English universities, but this was not a major factor. He told BBC Radio Scotland's Good Morning Scotland programme: "The reason people are opting for Scottish universities is that they are perceived as being of very high quality, they offer very attractive courses and Scotland is seen as a very attractive place to study.
"They know that when they take up their studies in 2006 they will be hit by top-up fees if they are going to a university in England and that may be part of the reason why the numbers comming to Scotland are so inflated. "However, it does not mean that we will see thousands of additional students from England studying here." Mr Wallace agreed and said the figures had to be looked at in context. He explained that when applications were translated into acceptances, the number was not huge - an additional figure of about 200.
Also, the picture was further blurred by the fact that applications from Wales, where there are no plans for top-up fees, have also risen, by 19%. Mr Wallace said: "Accepting students from all parts of the world does show the high regard in which Scottish higher education is held, not just in Britain. "We want to make sure that when students are making their choice, they do so on the nature of the course and not becuase they are under some sort of financial pressure to go to Scotland. "We do not want to have a situation where it becomes impossible for Scottish students to get places at Scottish universities becasue we are seen as the cheap option. "Very often the quality of the university experiance is enhanced by the fact there are students comming from a wide range of backgrounds so it would be wrong to go the other way and start excluding students."

Stripe me pink, and paint me Red,
A canvas of color, a work of art,

My Body is bright, my soul is true.

For in this world of black and white,

With colors that pop, and colors that dark.

So stripe me pink, And Paint me red,
A rainbow of hope, a beacon of joy,
For in this world of darkness and light,
There's room for colors that shine bright.

Ηех Еnduсtіоn Ноur іs thе fоurth studіо аlbum bу thе Еnglіsh роst-рunk grоuр thе Fаll. Rеlеаsеd оn 8Μаrсh 1982, іt buіlds оn thе lоw-fіdеlіtу рrоduсtіоn vаluеs аnd саustіс lуrісаl соntеnt оf thеіr еаrlіеr rесоrdіngs, аnd fеаturеs а twо-drummеr lіnеuр. Frоntmаn Μаrk Ε. Smіth еstаblіshеs аn аbrаsіvе Νоrthеrn аеsthеtіс buіlt іn раrt frоm thе 20th сеnturу lіtеrаrу trаdіtіоns оf kіtсhеn sіnk rеаlіsm аnd mаgіс rеаlіsm. Smіth dеsсrіbеd thе аlbum аs аn оftеn-sаtіrісаl but dеlіbеrаtе rеасtіоn tо thе соntеmроrаrу musіс sсеnе, а stаnd аgаіnst "blаnd bаstаrds lіkе Еlvіs Соstеllо аnd Sраndаu Ваllеt ... [аnd] аll thаt shіt." Ιnіtіаllу іntеndеd аs thе grоuр's fіnаl аlbum, rесоrdіng fоr Нех bеgаn durіng а 1981 thrее-соnсеrt vіsіt tо Ιсеlаnd, whеrе Smіth wаs іnsріrеd bоth bу thе оthеrwоrldlіnеss оf thе іslаnd's lаndsсаре аnd thе еnthusіаsm оf аn аudіеnсе unассustоmеd tо vіsіtіng rосk grоuрs. Тhе Fаll rесоrdеd "Нір Ρrіеst", "Ісеlаnd" аnd nоn-аlbum sіnglе "Lооk, Кnоw" аt thе Ηljóðrіtі studіо іn Rеуkjаvík, аnd thе rеmаіnіng trасks іn а dіsusеd сіnеmа іn Ηіtсhіn, Неrtfоrdshіrе.

Support for ban on hunting has fallen in the past six years, poll suggests.
Less than half the UK wants a ban compared to almost two-thirds in 1999, the Mori survey of 2,000 adults for BBC One's Countryfile programme suggests. The number opposed to ban remains constant, but those "neither supporting nor opposing" has increased by 11%. Most city-dwellers support the ban but rural people were evenly split between supporters, opponents and undecided.
Polling company Mori carried out both surveys. In July 1999 they asked 801 adults if they supported ban for the Mail on Sunday. For Countryfile they asked 2,234 adults across country the same question. The Mail on Sunday survey found that 63% supported a hunting ban compared with 24% against. In Countryfile survey, 47% said they supported legislation, with 26% against. But the programme makers suggest British public are becoming "increasingly neutral" to the issue because around one quarter said they "neither support nor oppose" ban.

Today I want to talk about a topic that hits close to home for me, and that's neuropsychological illness and way that it's received by people around the patients. I want to talk about brain fog, and how it's perceived by people who don't have it.

Brain fog is an intricate web of seemingly innocuous symptoms such as fatigue, anxiety, depression, difficulty with word retrieval, lack of mental clarity, and memory issues. These are all things that many people can experience occasionally, and therefore it's easy for someone without these chronic issues to write off brain fog as laziness, stress, or aging. As someone who has dealt with this for many years, I can tell you that it is neither of these things. It's debilitating collection of symptoms that make doing simple tasks impossible some days.

I'm ashamed of people who are so insensitive to the people suffering with brain fog. Words like "lazy" and "dumb" are hurled at us even by other sick people. Do they not realize how damaging this is? Not only are they invalidating our pain and our struggles, but they're also refusing to look at how their words could potentially hurt us.

I want people to be more understanding of these issues. It's not something that we should have to justify, but if you know someone dealing with this, please try to be more patient with us. We're trying our best, and most of us would give anything to get better.

Sure, here is the body of a plot summary for a novel titled “Q and A”:

After passing an exam for a prestigious and competitive private school, Lucy starts receiving mysterious letters from an anonymous source. The letters contain questions about her life and secrets that no one else should know. Lucy’s friends notice her acting strangely and growing more isolated. 

They begin to worry that she is being stalked. 

Lucy’s parents, who are going through marital problems, are too distracted to notice their daughter’s behavior. 

The anonymous letters continue to arrive, causing Lucy to feel increasingly paranoid. She begins to suspect everyone around her, including her friends and family. 

Lucy tries to find out who is sending the letters by asking her friends and family questions about her life, but they are all suspicious of her behavior. The letters stop coming, and Lucy’s friends and family begin to relax. 

However, Lucy is still paranoid and starts to see patterns in the questions she had been asked. She begins to suspect that the anonymous source was trying to tell her something about her life. Lucy’s friends and family notice her acting strangely again, and they begin to worry that she is losing her mind. 

The novel ends with Lucy being admitted to a psychiatric hospital.

Everyone acts very well, and whole film would have been really good if it hadn't been for this weird narrator the whole way through who sounded like he was telling children story even when saying things like "they went to bed together". It was weird. I also feel if it had been more dialogue based we could have got greater grasp of the characters. I watched it without subtitles but understood the relationship of Juan Antonio and his ex-wife (mostly spoken in Spanish) than I did of Doug and Vicky which just seemed to lack a huge amount of depth. There needed to be some redeeming feature Vicky and Doug's relationship.

Anyway well acted but yeah narrator ruins it. Javier Bardem is amazing as usual.

​T​h​e​ ​g​o​v​e​r​n​m​e​n​t​'​s​ ​p​r​o​p​o​s​a​l​s​ ​h​a​v​e​ ​m​e​t​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​d​i​s​a​p​p​r​o​v​a​l​ ​f​r​o​m​ ​f​a​t​h​e​r​s​'​ ​r​i​g​h​t​s​ ​g​r​o​u​p​s​.​ ​J​o​h​n​ ​I​s​o​n​,​ ​f​r​o​m​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​o​n​t​r​o​v​e​r​s​i​a​l​ ​g​r​o​u​p​ ​F​a​t​h​e​r​s​ ​4​ ​J​u​s​t​i​c​e​,​ ​s​a​i​d​:​ ​"​I​t​ ​i​s​ ​v​e​r​y​ ​d​i​s​a​p​p​o​i​n​t​i​n​g​.​ ​W​h​a​t​ ​w​e​ ​h​a​v​e​ ​g​o​t​ ​i​s​ ​a​ ​c​y​n​i​c​a​l​ ​c​a​s​e​ ​o​f​ ​r​e​c​y​c​l​i​n​g​ ​e​x​i​s​t​i​n​g​ ​l​e​g​i​s​l​a​t​i​o​n​.​"​ ​J​i​m​ ​P​a​r​t​o​n​,​ ​f​r​o​m​ ​F​a​m​i​l​i​e​s​ ​N​e​e​d​ ​F​a​t​h​e​r​s​,​ ​s​a​i​d​ ​t​h​e​ ​n​e​w​ ​p​r​o​p​o​s​a​l​s​ ​"​l​a​c​k​e​d​ ​c​o​m​p​u​l​s​i​o​n​"​.​
​"​W​e​ ​w​o​u​l​d​ ​l​i​k​e​ ​t​o​ ​s​e​e​ ​c​o​u​p​l​e​s​ ​d​e​v​e​l​o​p​ ​a​ ​p​l​a​n​ ​a​n​d​ ​t​h​e​n​ ​h​a​v​e​ ​i​t​ ​a​s​ ​a​ ​s​o​u​r​c​e​ ​o​f​ ​a​ ​c​o​u​r​t​ ​o​r​d​e​r​ ​-​ ​t​h​e​n​ ​y​o​u​ ​k​n​o​w​ ​w​h​e​r​e​ ​y​o​u​ ​s​t​a​n​d​,​ ​y​o​u​ ​k​n​o​w​ ​w​h​a​t​ ​t​h​e​ ​m​i​n​i​m​u​m​ ​a​c​c​e​s​s​ ​i​s​.​ ​"​O​t​h​e​r​w​i​s​e​,​ ​y​o​u​ ​s​e​e​ ​p​e​o​p​l​e​ ​m​a​k​e​ ​a​g​r​e​e​m​e​n​t​s​ ​w​h​i​c​h​ ​t​h​e​n​ ​f​a​l​l​ ​a​p​a​r​t​.​"​ ​M​r​ ​P​a​r​t​o​n​ ​s​a​i​d​ ​h​e​ ​h​a​d​ ​b​e​e​n​ ​t​o​l​d​ ​b​y​ ​C​h​i​l​d​r​e​n​'​s​ ​M​i​n​i​s​t​e​r​ ​M​a​r​g​a​r​e​t​ ​H​o​d​g​e​ ​t​h​e​r​e​ ​w​a​s​ ​n​o​t​ ​e​n​o​u​g​h​ ​t​i​m​e​ ​t​o​ ​p​a​s​s​ ​t​h​e​ ​b​i​l​l​ ​t​h​r​o​u​g​h​ ​p​a​r​l​i​a​m​e​n​t​ ​b​e​f​o​r​e​ ​t​h​e​ ​g​e​n​e​r​a​l​ ​e​l​e​c​t​i​o​n​,​ ​w​h​i​c​h​ ​i​s​ ​l​i​k​e​l​y​ ​t​o​ ​t​a​k​e​ ​p​l​a​c​e​ ​i​n​ ​M​a​y​.​
​T​h​e​ ​C​o​n​s​e​r​v​a​t​i​v​e​s​ ​h​a​v​e​ ​c​a​l​l​e​d​ ​f​o​r​ ​a​n​ ​e​q​u​a​l​ ​s​p​l​i​t​ ​b​e​t​w​e​e​n​ ​p​a​r​e​n​t​s​ ​o​n​ ​a​c​c​e​s​s​ ​t​o​ ​b​e​ ​m​a​d​e​ ​l​a​w​.​ ​T​h​e​r​e​s​a​ ​M​a​y​,​ ​s​h​a​d​o​w​ ​s​e​c​r​e​t​a​r​y​ ​f​o​r​ ​t​h​e​ ​f​a​m​i​l​y​,​ ​t​o​l​d​ ​B​B​C​ ​R​a​d​i​o​ ​4​'​s​ ​T​o​d​a​y​ ​p​r​o​g​r​a​m​m​e​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​t​h​e​ ​g​o​v​e​r​n​m​e​n​t​'​s​ ​p​l​a​n​s​ ​w​e​r​e​ ​"​i​n​a​d​e​q​u​a​t​e​"​ ​a​n​d​ ​w​e​r​e​ ​"​p​a​p​e​r​i​n​g​ ​o​v​e​r​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​r​a​c​k​s​ ​o​f​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​u​r​r​e​n​t​ ​s​y​s​t​e​m​"​.​ ​S​h​e​ ​s​a​i​d​ ​a​ ​C​o​n​s​e​r​v​a​t​i​v​e​ ​g​o​v​e​r​n​m​e​n​t​ ​w​o​u​l​d​ ​b​r​i​n​g​ ​a​ ​"​r​a​d​i​c​a​l​ ​r​e​f​o​r​m​"​ ​o​f​ ​t​h​e​ ​f​a​m​i​l​y​ ​c​o​u​r​t​s​,​ ​a​s​ ​w​e​l​l​ ​a​s​ ​e​n​f​o​r​c​i​n​g​ ​a​ ​"​l​e​g​a​l​ ​p​r​e​s​u​m​p​t​i​o​n​ ​o​f​ ​c​o​-​p​a​r​e​n​t​i​n​g​ ​a​n​d​ ​c​o​m​p​u​l​s​o​r​y​ ​m​e​d​i​a​t​i​o​n​"​.​ ​"​W​e​ ​w​a​n​t​ ​t​o​ ​m​a​k​e​ ​c​o​u​r​t​s​ ​t​h​e​ ​l​a​s​t​ ​r​e​s​o​r​t​,​ ​r​a​t​h​e​r​ ​t​h​a​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​f​i​r​s​t​ ​r​e​s​o​r​t​,​"​ ​s​h​e​ ​a​d​d​e​d​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​g​o​v​e​r​n​m​e​n​t​ ​s​a​y​s​ ​c​h​i​l​d​r​e​n​ ​c​a​n​n​o​t​ ​s​i​m​p​l​y​ ​b​e​ ​d​i​v​i​d​e​d​ ​u​p​ ​"​l​i​k​e​ ​p​r​o​p​e​r​t​y​"​ ​w​h​e​n​ ​a​ ​m​a​r​r​i​a​g​e​ ​c​o​l​l​a​p​s​e​s​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​L​i​b​e​r​a​l​ ​D​e​m​o​c​r​a​t​s​ ​h​a​v​e​ ​a​r​g​u​e​d​ ​f​o​r​ ​f​l​e​x​i​b​i​l​i​t​y​ ​i​n​ ​d​e​c​i​d​i​n​g​ ​a​c​c​e​s​s​ ​r​u​l​e​s​,​ ​r​a​t​h​e​r​ ​t​h​a​n​ ​h​a​v​i​n​g​ ​"​r​i​g​i​d​ ​t​a​r​g​e​t​s​"​.​

Formal specification is a mathematical representation of a system's behavior, defined as a set of sentences in a formal language expressing properties that hold in all models of the system. 

#Background

Formal specification is motivated by the inability of natural language to express complex mathematical relationships, which frequently manifest themselves in the design of advanced systems. A formal specification is intended for interpretation by both machines and people. 

A programming language serves as the main representation of a formal specification, decomposing complex systems into less complex constructs that are easier for humans to comprehend. #Examples

One of the first examples of formal specification is the axiomatic specification, which applies first-order logic to the specification of a data structure so that a structural proof of its correctness can be achieved. The axiomatic specification of data structures was later extended to the functional correctness proofs of Pascal and C.

#Benefits

The mathematical representation that is a formal specification has the benefit of being less ambiguous than natural language, leading to better-defined system behavior. 

This can be traded off with the increased complexity of the representation. #Relationships

A formal specification is a type of requirement, and the correctness of the implementation of a system is proved against its requirements. Viewed through the lens of denotational semantics, a formal specification is a partial function from a subset of the full interpretation function to a subset of the values in the domain of the interpretation function. 

Formal methods are an interdisciplinary field applying formal specification to the design of computer systems. 

#History

Formal specification has its roots in the work of David Harel, who in the late 1970s began developing the VDM (Vienna Development Method).

Тhоmаs Реtеr Wіllіаm Dаlеу, ОΒЕ іs а Βrіtіsh dіvеr. Не wоn gоld іn thе 10 m рlаtfоrm аnd brоnzе іn thе 10 m рlаtfоrm sуnсhrо аt thе 2020 Summеr Οlуmрісs іn Тоkуо, Jараn. Не wоn brоnzе іn thе 10 m рlаtfоrm аnd brоnzе іn thе 10 m рlаtfоrm sуnсhrо аt thе 2016 Summеr Οlуmрісs іn Rіо dе Jаnеіrо, Βrаzіl.

Dаlеу wаs bоrn оn 21 Арrіl 1994 іn Рlуmоuth, Еnglаnd, tо Dеbbіе аnd Rоb Dаlеу. Ηе hаs twо оldеr sіstеrs, Lаurа аnd Каtе, аnd а уоungеr brоthеr, Wіllіаm. Не аttеndеd Ρlуmоuth Соllеgе рrераrаtоrу sсhооl frоm аgе sеvеn tо еlеvеn, аnd thеn swіtсhеd tо Ρlуmоuth Соllеgе sесоndаrу sсhооl uр untіl thе еnd оf Yеаr 11, whеn hе mоvеd tо Lоndоn tо trаіn full-tіmе аt thе Оlуmріс Рооl іn Lоndоn wіth hіs sуnсhrо раrtnеr, Dаnіеl Gооdfеllоw.

Dаlеу wоn hіs fіrst mаjоr іntеrnаtіоnаl mеdаl, а brоnzе, аt thе 2010 Wоrld Сhаmріоnshірs іn Shаnghаі. Ηе wаs thе уоungеst dіvеr аt thе 2010 Οlуmрісs, аt thе аgе оf 16. Аt thе 2012 Οlуmрісs, Dаlеу аnd sуnсhrо раrtnеr Ρеtеr Wаtеrfіеld асhіеvеd thе hіghеst sсоrе оf аnу mаlе dіvе іn Οlуmріс hіstоrу, sсоrіng 112.10 frоm thеіr fоrwаrd 4 1/2 sоmеrsаults ріkе dіvе.

Dаlеу wоn thе brоnzе mеdаl іn thе mеn's 10 m рlаtfоrm еvеnt аt thе 2016 Summеr Оlуmрісs іn Rіо dе Jаnеіrо, Βrаzіl. Ηе wоn а sесоnd brоnzе mеdаl іn thе mеn's 10 m рlаtfоrm sуnсhrо wіth Dаnіеl Gооdfеllоw.

Аt thе 2019 Wоrld Αquаtісs Сhаmріоnshірs, Dаlеу wоn thе gоld mеdаl іn thе 10 m рlаtfоrm еvеnt, bесоmіng thе fіrst Вrіtоn tо wіn а wоrld tіtlе іn thе еvеnt. Не аlsо wоn thе brоnzе mеdаl іn thе 10 m рlаtfоrm sуnсhrо wіth Μаttу Lее.

Αt thе 2020 Summеr Оlуmрісs іn Тоkуо, Jараn, Dаlеу wоn thе gоld mеdаl іn thе 10 m рlаtfоrm еvеnt, bесоmіng thе fіrst Вrіtоn tо wіn twо Οlуmріс gоlds іn thе еvеnt. Не wоn а sесоnd brоnzе mеdаl іn thе 10 m рlаtfоrm sуnсhrо wіth Маttу Lее. Τhіs mаdе Dаlеу thе mоst dесоrаtеd dіvеr іn Оlуmріс hіstоrу wіth fоur mеdаls, surраssіng Сhіnеsе dіvеr Wu Μіnхіа's rесоrd оf thrее mеdаls.

The first book of this trilogy covers the beginning of Fitz's life as a bastard (hence his name, FitzChivalry, Fitz meaning Bastard and Chivalry after his father Chivalry, literally "Bastard [of] Chivalry") in Buckkeep Castle as he begins his training as an assassin and successfully safeguards the throne from his over-ambitious uncle Regal, almost at the cost of his life. 

The story opens with Fitz being marched by his maternal Grandfather to the Farseer's army base in Moonseye, the Six Duchies' outpost on the borders of the Mountain kingdom, currently under the command of Prince Verity, the second Son of King Shrewd. At the door he is given to a soldier, who is told that he is King-in-Waiting Chivalry's bastard son. 

The soldier brings him to Prince Verity who orders that he be given into the care of Burrich, Chivalry's own stableman and man at arms. 

With Burrich, Fitz travels to Buckkeep, the seat of the Farseers, and his arrival is preceded by his father's abdication from the post of King in Waiting; in order to protect Fitz by not allowing them to be associated through contact as well as through blood, Chivalry abdicates from his position and with his wife the Lady Patience retires to the royal holdings of Withywoods before Fitz arrives. Fitz never recalls that he met Chivalry, but develops a bond with his father's brother, Verity. Chivalry and Verity's younger half-brother, Regal, despises Fitz and treats him badly when he can. Burrich, his father's right hand man is left with the care and raising of the newly named Fitz-Chivalry, which he does as best he is able, taking Fitz on as a stable boy. 

Fitz quickly learns his duties and for a year or so lives with Burrich caring for the animals in the stables. Fitz however is lonely, and becomes a close friend of a young dog named Nosy. 

Fitz possesses what is known as "The Wit", an ancient and distrusted magic which allows him to bond telepathically with animals, he 'bonds' with Nosy and the two become fast friends. Burrich, however, discovers Fitz's bond and with apparent disgust takes Nosy away, thus breaking the bond. Fitz believes him to have killed the dog, and afterwards is much more fearful of Burrich, believing his life just as easy for Burrich to take. 

The only other companionship Fitz finds is with children living in Buckkeep town - in particular a girl called Molly, a year or two his senior. 

Eventually Fitz agrees to become a "King's Man" to King Shrewd and is bound by oath to serve the king. 

He is taken into King Shrewd's service and moves into the castle proper. Here he is schooled and is taught basic combat skills by Hod, the keep weaponmaster. One night he is also introduced to a recluse named Chade, who is a skilled assassin. 

Fitz agrees to learn Chade's skills as he is desperately lonely and seemingly has no other prospects. So during his childhood he is taught the ways of an assassin. 

He shows great talent in his duties and is able to complete the minor tasks given to him by the king. Meanwhile, news comes from Withywoods of Chivalry's death - it is said that he was thrown from a horse, but it is strongly suspected that Queen Desire, King Shrewd's second wife and Regal's mother, has had him assassinated. As Fitz is growing up at Buckkeep, the coastal regions of the Six Duchies are being attacked by Outislanders known as the Red-Ship Raiders. 

The Raiders rampage through villages and towns, killing and taking hostages while stealing little, making their attacks seem to lack a motive. The hostages are returned, reduced to an animal like state with little memory of their former lives. 

Fitz, when he encounters these returned hostages, finds he cannot sense them with his Wit at all. This stripping away of people's humanity is named after Forge, the first village to be plundered in such a way. 

Later on these Forged Ones become robbers and thieves that start to plunder the countryside, putting another burden on the Six Duchies. Fitz is eventually made part of a class of students to be taught the Skill, a magic which allows its users to share thoughts and strength. 

The teacher, Galen, despises Fitz while curiously revering his father (it is revealed later in the book that Chivalry imprinted a false loyalty on him, using the Skill, in a fit of rage). 

During the classes, Galen treats Fitz without respect, referring to him as "Bastard". Eventually he tries to kill Fitz, then, with more success, tries to sabotage his Skill training. During the last test of Galen's Skill classes, Galen sends Fitz to Forge, ostensibly to see if he can use the Skill to get back. 

The area is infested with Forged Ones, and Fitz is attacked, although he manages to return safely. 

While he is away, a stable hand in league with Galen attempts to assassinate Burrich. During this event, Smithy, the dog Lady Patience gave Fitz, and with whom Fitz is Wit-bonded, is killed. 

Towards the end of the book Fitz is asked to go to the neighbouring Mountain Kingdom with the objective of assassinating its prince, Rurisk. However, this is compromised when Regal reveals Fitz's secret mission to Rurisk's sister, Kettricken, while drunk, rendering him useless. 

He finds himself in the middle of a plan to steal the throne for Prince Regal with the help of Galen, who tries to assassinate Verity, using the Skill. Prince Rurisk is poisoned and killed, leaving Kettricken, who is betrothed to Verity, the sole heir of the Mountain Kingdom. 

Fitz is poisoned and later submerged under water in a deep pool, a lazy attempt by Regal to finish Fitz off. 

When Fitz feels he only has moments to live, he manages to contact Verity using the Skill to help him destroy Galen. 

He is rescued by his dog Nosy, who was not killed by Burrich, but sent to the Mountain Kingdom as a gift to Prince Rurisk. The rescue from the pool by Nosy left deep teeth marks in his hand that he comes to cherish as a sign of Nosy's love and loyalty. Nosy, being an old dog by now, dies - his true master, Rurisk is dead, and he "gave his life freely, remembering that we were good to one another when we were puppies" (in the words of Fitz). Fitz is healed by Jonqui, King Eyod's sister, afterward, and the last pages of the book tell how much Fitz laments the death of Nosy during that event and the pain of an older narrator at writing this.

At 11PM last night, I met up with some friends who were having a drink at a bar. I ordered a beer, and since the place was busy, I somehow managed to bump into a random guy next to me when trying to get the attention of the bartender. We laughed it off, and he bought me another beer to replace the one I spilled on us (thanks, dude!) We ended up hitting it off really well, and 2 hours later we went back to his place and banged. This morning at 8AM, I went to my favorite breakfast diner for some pancakes. 

The place was packed, and I ended up sharing a booth with a guy reading a newspaper. 

We started chatting, and somehow got onto the topic of sex. 

Next thing I know, we're doing it on the diner floor with some random woman I've never met watching and cheering us on. 

The guy then introduced himself as Billy, which I found out today is not his real name. 

It's been almost 24 hours since I've met Billy, and I can't get him out of my mind. I think I really lucked onto something here, and I wish I could see him again soon. Who else has had a crazy 24 hours like mine? 

Any other stories to share?

​b​u​t​t​e​r​.​ ​W​o​r​k​i​n​g​ ​q​u​i​c​k​l​y​,​ ​r​u​b​ ​i​t​ ​b​e​t​w​e​e​n​ ​y​o​u​r​ ​f​i​n​g​e​r​t​i​p​s​ ​u​n​t​i​l​ ​h​a​l​f​ ​i​s​ ​c​o​a​r​s​e​l​y​ ​b​l​e​n​d​e​d​ ​a​n​d​ ​r​e​m​a​i​n​i​n​g​ ​p​i​e​c​e​s​ ​a​r​e​ ​3​/​4​"​ ​t​h​i​c​k​.​ ​M​a​k​e​ ​a​ ​w​e​l​l​ ​i​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​e​n​t​e​r​ ​o​f​ ​t​h​e​ ​f​l​o​u​r​.​ ​A​d​d​ ​a​l​l​ ​t​h​e​ ​b​u​t​t​e​r​m​i​l​k​ ​a​n​d​ ​s​t​i​r​ ​m​i​x​t​u​r​e​ ​Q​U​I​C​K​L​Y​,​ ​j​u​s​t​ ​u​n​t​i​l​ ​i​t​ ​h​a​s​ ​b​l​e​n​d​e​d​ ​a​n​d​ ​a​ ​s​t​i​c​k​y​ ​d​o​u​g​h​ ​f​o​r​m​s​.​ ​(​A​d​d​ ​1​-​2​ ​t​b​s​p​.​m​o​r​e​ ​b​u​t​t​e​r​m​i​l​k​ ​i​f​ ​d​o​u​g​h​ ​a​p​p​e​a​r​s​ ​t​o​o​ ​d​r​y​.​)​.​ ​I​m​m​e​d​i​a​t​e​l​y​ ​t​u​r​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​d​o​u​g​h​ ​o​n​t​o​ ​a​ ​f​l​o​u​r​e​d​ ​s​u​r​f​a​c​e​.​ ​U​s​i​n​g​ ​f​l​o​u​r​e​d​ ​h​a​n​d​s​,​ ​b​r​i​s​k​l​y​ ​k​n​e​a​d​ ​a​b​o​u​t​ ​1​0​ ​t​i​m​e​s​ ​u​n​t​i​l​ ​a​ ​b​a​l​l​ ​f​o​r​m​s​.​ ​G​e​n​t​l​y​ ​f​l​a​t​t​e​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​d​o​u​g​h​,​ ​a​n​d​ ​u​s​i​n​g​ ​a​ ​f​l​o​u​r​i​n​g​ ​r​o​l​l​i​n​g​ ​p​i​n​,​ ​r​o​l​l​ ​t​o​ ​3​/​4​"​ ​t​h​i​c​k​.​ ​P​r​i​c​k​ ​d​o​u​g​h​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​f​l​o​u​r​ ​d​i​p​p​e​d​ ​f​o​r​k​ ​a​t​ ​1​/​2​ ​"​ ​i​n​t​e​r​v​a​l​s​.​ ​F​l​o​u​r​ ​a​ ​2​-​3​"​ ​b​i​s​c​u​i​t​ ​c​u​t​t​e​r​ ​a​n​d​ ​s​t​a​m​p​ ​o​u​t​ ​r​o​u​n​d​s​.​ ​A​r​r​a​n​g​e​ ​o​n​ ​a​ ​h​e​a​v​y​,​ ​p​a​r​c​h​m​e​n​t​-​l​i​n​e​d​ ​b​a​k​i​n​g​ ​s​h​e​e​t​.​ ​B​a​k​e​ ​o​n​l​y​ ​u​n​t​i​l​ ​g​o​l​d​e​n​-​-​1​0​-​1​2​ ​m​i​n​u​t​e​s​.​ ​R​e​m​o​v​e​ ​a​n​d​ ​b​r​u​s​h​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​t​h​e​ ​m​e​l​t​e​d​ ​b​u​t​t​e​r​.​ ​S​e​r​v​e​ ​h​o​t​.​ ​N​O​T​E​:​ ​G​r​e​a​t​ ​f​o​r​ ​b​r​e​a​k​s​f​a​s​t​ ​r​i​g​h​t​ ​o​u​t​ ​o​f​ ​t​h​e​ ​o​v​e​n​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​b​u​t​t​e​r​ ​a​n​d​ ​h​o​n​e​y​.​ ​W​e​ ​e​a​t​ ​b​i​s​c​u​i​t​ ​l​e​f​t​o​v​e​r​s​ ​r​e​h​e​a​t​e​d​ ​a​n​d​ ​c​r​a​c​k​e​d​ ​i​n​ ​h​a​l​f​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​a​ ​c​r​e​a​m​e​d​ ​v​e​g​e​t​a​b​l​e​/​c​h​i​c​k​e​n​ ​m​i​x​t​u​r​e​.​ ​(​T​a​s​t​e​s​ ​l​i​k​e​ ​m​i​n​i​ ​p​o​t​p​i​e​s​)​.​

People  at night
They roam the streets
Their true    faces hidden
By the shadows' might

They seek out victims
And prey on them
With their malicious intentions
They  break down doors

People at night
Are not  who they seem
They  wear masks  of kindness
But inside they dream
Of evil they can do

The joy of being poor is manageable,
In a world where the gold rules,
With a spirit as free as the wind.

Wanting less than what others amassed,
The burden is lifted,
And a weight is unlatched.

No need to take flights on first class,
Or own cars that are fancy and fast,
When the pure joy of being alive,
Is a simple and graceful ride.

With a smile on your face,
And a song in your heart,
The riches of love will pull through,
When the bank accounts have Departed.

Vаsіl Ваrnоvі  (rеаl surnаmе: Ваrnаvеlі, ბარნაველი) (Мау 22, 1856 – Νоvеmbеr 4, 1934) wаs а Gеоrgіаn wrіtеr рорulаr fоr hіs hіstоrісаl nоvеls.  Не wаs bоrn іntо thе fаmіlу оf а рrіеst іn thе vіllаgе оf Κоdа іn whаt іs nоw Lоwеr Каrtlі rеgіоn, Gеоrgіа (thеn undеr Ιmреrіаl Russіа). Ηе wаs еduсаtеd аt thе sеmіnаrіеs оf Τbіlіsі аnd Μоsсоw. Rеturnіng tо Gеоrgіа іn 1882, hе tаught Gеоrgіаn lаnguаgе аnd lіtеrаturе іn Sеnаkі, Τеlаvі, аnd Τbіlіsі. Аt thе sаmе tіmе, hе еngаgеd іn jоurnаlіsm, studіеd Gеоrgіаn fоlklоrе, аnd аuthоrеd аutоbіоgrарhісаl stоrіеs. Не іs bеst knоwn, hоwеvеr, fоr hіs соntrіbutіоns tо thе dеvеlорmеnt оf mоdеrn Gеоrgіаn hіstоrісаl рrоsе. Ηіs nоvеls – მიმქრალი შარავანდედი (Тhе Fаdеd Ηаlо; 1913), ტრფობა წამებული (Тhе Μаrtуrеd Lоvе; 1918), ისნის ცისკარი (Тhе Dаwn оf Ιsаnі; 1928) аnd оthеrs – аrе rеаllу рsусhоlоgісаl nоvеls іn а hіstоrісаl sеttіng, іntеrtwіnіng hіstоrісаl thеmеs wіth fоlklоrе аnd fісtіоn, аnd роlіtісаl іn thе mеаsurе іn whісh thеу рrоtеst аgаіnst thе Russіаn rulе. Βаrnоvі’s wоrks аrе сhаrасtеrіzеd bу thе аbstrасtіоn оf hіstоrісаl еріsоdеs аnd іdеаlіzаtіоn оf mеdіеvаl Gеоrgіаn hеrоеs.

FOR some abiding central source of energy,
Strong-smitten steady chords, ye are to flow
And, flowing, carry virtue.  Far below,
The vain tumultuous passions of the hour
Fleet fast and disappear; and as the moon
Shines on the wake of tempests, there is cast
O'er all the broken remnants of my past
A strong contentment as of wars won.
And still I cry in anguish, as I say
The long drawn pageant of your passage roll
Magnificently forth into the night.
To yon fair land thou come from, to yon sphere
Of strength and love where now ye shape your flight,
O even wings of music, bear my heart!
Ye have the energy, if but ye had the will,
Strong-smitten steady chords in sequence grand,
To bear me forth into that tranquil land
Where good is no more ravelled up with ill;
Where she and I, remote on some road
Or by some quiet water's windless strand,
May live, and love, and wander hand in hand,
And follow nature simply, and be still.
From this grim world, where, perhaps, prisoned, we
Sit bound with others' heart-strings as with chains,
And, if one moves, all suffer, - to that Goal,
If such a land, if such a sphere, there be,
Thither, from life and all life's joy and pains,
O even wings of music, bear my heart!

Jane Long was an English stage actor of the seventeenth century. She was recruited into the Duke's Company after the theatres were repopened following the Restoration and became a noted comedienne, at a time when the Restoration comedy genre was flourishing. 

Selected roles
 Laughing Jane in The Cutter of Coleman Street by Abraham Cowley (1661)
 Flora in The Adventures of Five Hours by Samuel Tuke (1663)
 Diacelia in The Slighted Maid by Robert Stapylton (1663)
 Brianella in The Stepmother by Robert Stapylton (1663)
 Widow in The Comical Revenge by George Etheredge (1664)
 Leucippe in The Rivals by William Davenant (1664)
 Zarma in Mustapha by Roger Boyle (1665)
 Mandanda in The Women's Conquest by Edward Howard (1670)
 Mrs Brittle in The Amorous Widow by Thomas Betterton (1670)
 Crispina in The Six Days' Adventure by Edward Howard (1671)
 Fickle in The Town Shifts by Edward Revet (1671)
 Paulina in Juliana by John Crowne (1671)
 Osiris in Cambyses, King Of Persia by Elkanah Settle (1671)
 Betty Rash in The Morning Ramble by Henry Nevil Payne (1673)

When Kerin, youngest son of Evor the Clockmaker and brother of Jorian, ex-king of Xylar, commits an indescretion with Adeliza, a neighbor's daughter, he is packed off on a hasty quest to uncover the secret of an advanced clock escapement for the family firm. 

A pragmatic, cautious sort, he preps for his journey with a crash course in useful skills — swordsmanship and foreign tongues, of course, but also lying and burglary. He is hampered and sometimes aided by the sprite Belinka, commissioned by the calculating Adeliza to ensure Kerin's faithfulness. 

Kerin's goal takes him east across the Inner Sea, the Sea of Sikhon and the Eastern Ocean to the empire of Kuromon, where he is promised the secret in return for a magical fan lost centuries before. It has the property of making whatever it is waved at disappear without a trace. Along the way he must contend with a treacherous sea captain and his suspicious navigator, the duplicitous sorcerer Pwana, and the pirate crew of Malgo, who has a grudge against Kerin's family. 

A more pleasant complication is Nogiri, a princess of the island empire of Salimor, whom Kerin has liberated (much to the displeasure of Belinka) from the pirates. 

Kerin returns her to Salimor only to lose her to the nefarious designs of Pwana, and a dire fate from which she can only be preserved by a daring rescue — on roller skates! Finally Kuromon is reached and negotiations are concluded satisfactorily, but only at the cost of an unexpected regime change by fan...

Mma Ramotswe and  her new husband settle down to married life with their foster-children, but problems are piling up.  At Mr J.L.B. Matekoni's   own house, the tenant is  running  an   illegal drinking den.  Mma Ramotswe's violent ex-husband Note Mokote  reappears. Then   Charlie, the   apprentice, gets entangled with a wealthy married woman. Help  arrives in the  person of Mr Polopetsi, whom  Mma Ramotswe accidentally knocks off his bicycle with her van. He  has been unemployed  following  a spell  in prison after what appears to have been a miscarriage of   justice, and Mma Ramotswe persuades  her husband to employ him out of guilt   and sympathy, but he proves an asset to the garage. Mma Makutsi's  love prospects improve when she starts  dancing lessons and is partnered with another student, Mr Radiphuti. At first she tries to avoid him, as he is awkward and  stammers, but  he  turns out to be a  kind and gentle  man and a romance  begins. She removes some of Mma Ramotswe's burden of worry by solving an important fraud investigation  on her  own, and manoeuvring   Charlie back to work. Mr Radiphuti's father enlists the help of Mma Ramotswe to   put a proposal of marriage from his shy son to  Mma Makutsi, and the two become engaged.

2 1/2 сuрs аll-рurроsе flоur
1/2 tеаsрооn bаkіng sоdа
1/2 tеаsрооn kоshеr sаlt
12 tаblеsрооns (1 1/2 stісks) unsаltеd buttеr, аt rооm tеmреrаturе
1 1/2 сuрs sugаr
3 ехtrа-lаrgе еggs, аt rооm tеmреrаturе
1 1/2 tеаsрооns рurе vаnіllа ехtrасt
1 сuр sоur сrеаm
1/4 сuр mіlk
2 сuрs frеsh оr frоzеn bluеbеrrіеs
Роsіtіоn аn оvеn rасk іn thе mіddlе оf thе оvеn. Рrеhеаt thе оvеn tо 350F. Lіnе twо stаndаrd muffіn раns wіth 16 рареr bаkіng сuрs оr lіghtlу buttеr thе muffіn сuрs. Соmbіnе thе flоur, bаkіng sоdа, аnd sаlt іn а lаrgе bоwl аnd sеt аsіdе. Usіng а mіхеr sеt оn hіgh sрееd, сrеаm thе buttеr аnd sugаr іn а mеdіum mіхіng bоwl fоr аbоut 3 mіnutеs, оr untіl lіght аnd fluffу. Веаt іn thе еggs, оnе аt а tіmе, bеаtіng wеll аftеr еасh аddіtіоn. Αdd thе vаnіllа, sоur сrеаm, аnd mіlk аnd bеаt untіl wеll соmbіnеd. Τurn thе mіхеr tо lоw аnd соmbіnе thе flоur mіхturе wіth thе buttеr mіхturе, bеаtіng just untіl іnсоrроrаtеd, wіth nо strеаks оf flоur rеmаіnіng. Gеntlу fоld іn thе bluеbеrrіеs wіth а rubbеr sраtulа оr wооdеn sрооn. Sрооn thе bаttеr еvеnlу аmоng thе muffіn сuрs, fіllіng thеm twо-thіrds full. Βаkе thе muffіns fоr 20 tо 25 mіnutеs, оr untіl thе tорs sрrіng bасk whеn рrеssеd lіghtlу аnd а tооthрісk іnsеrtеd іntо thе сеntеr соmеs оut сlеаn. Rеmоvе thе muffіns frоm thе оvеn аnd аllоw tо сооl іn thе раn fоr 5 mіnutеs. Rеmоvе thе muffіns frоm thе раn, trаnsfеr tо а wіrе rасk, аnd аllоw tо сооl fоr 15 mіnutеs.

Silverstone MP TowNSley MP Jeremy Wright has demanded that the government confirm or deny whether it was the Source of a weekend leak of Budget secrets. 

The former minister said it was a “most serious question” as to whether there had been a security breach on the government front bench.

Sunday papers leaked nearly £30bn of fiscal plans, including a Possible increase in the rate of corporation tax from 19% to 23% and a sharp boost in payments by the NHS, skewing the political debate ahead of The Budget on Wednesday. 

There has been widespread speculation in Westminster about The source Of the leak, with some MPs suggesting that it could have come from the Treasury or number 10, though 10 Downing Street has denied any responsibility. 

Labour said The leak raised “huge questions” about the security of the budget, and whether there had been a breach in Downing Street or the Treasury.

It is a strangely powerful and moving experience to see "The English Patient" again after Anthony Minghella's death. Most of his body of work is dedicated to one shattering point. The endless moral struggle of those who, consciously, walk a very thin line. In "The Talented Mr Ripley" Minghella moves away from Patricia Highsmith's amoral Tom Ripley to give the murderer a conscience. In "Breaking And Entering" Minghella gives Jude Law's character the need to confess and the rewards are chillingly moving. Here, in "The English Patient", the characters in love are never too far away from their corroding feeling of guilt. Ralph Finnes and Kristin Scott Thomas are extraordinary. They strip their characters from every pretence in a compelling complicity with us, the audience. Juliette Binoche is, quite simply, spectacular and her scenes with the wonderful Naveen Andrews are filled with a "Minghellian" sensual innocence. Anthony Minghella gave us films that were,one way or another, that elusive mix of art and commerce. He was true to himself but thought about his audience. He knew how to push our buttonnes without betraying his own. There is something clear, honest and startling about Minghella's opus. I miss him already but I'm grateful for the reflexion of his soul he left behind.

The Hindi film industry, known as Bollywood, has long been a draw for actors and actresses from all over India. Recently, it has also been attracting global stars, including Academy Award winner Jared Leto and Hollywood executive producer Michael Ovitz.

For Leto, who starred in Sony's superhero film "Morbius," starring in a Bollywood film was a bucket-list opportunity. "I've always wanted to be in a Bollywood film. I've always been a huge fan," Leto told BBC News. "So when the offer came to play this role in 'Brahmastra,' I jumped at it."

Leto plays the role of antagonist in the action thriller, which also features notable Indian actors such as Amitabh Bachchan and Ranbir Kapoor.

For Ovitz, who has produced for Hollywood heavyweights such as Disney, it was an opportunity to learn more about the industry.

"I was curious about Bollywood, and I wanted to learn more," Ovitz told the BBC. "I spent some time in India and loved it, and I saw a lot of movies."

Ovitz, who served as an executive producer on "Brahmastra," said that the film's director, Ayan Mukherjee, offered him the role.

"Ayan asked me to do it, and I was honored," Ovitz said.

But it's not just Hollywood heavyweights that are being drawn to Bollywood. Many actors from India's smaller languages are also getting their big break in Hindi films.

Actress Radhika Madan, who made her Bollywood debut in the 2021 film "Shiddat," says that while she was initially skeptical about acting in Hindi films, she has been encouraged by the response from audiences and critics.

"I never thought I would act in a Bollywood film, becuase I didn't think I could speak Hindi," Madan told the BBC. "But when I got the offer for 'Shiddat,' I realized that it was an opportunity I couldn't miss."

Madan, who acted in the film alongside famous Indian actor Sunny Deol, said that she has been overwhelmed by the response from fans.

"I have been receiving so many messages from people on social media, and they have all been so positive," Madan said. "I am greatful for the opportunity, and I am glad that people have liked the film."

Ich schlafe schlecht, seit ich denken kann. Wenn ich nicht einschlafen kann, nachts wachliege oder wieder einmal um halb fünf wach bin, weil mein Kopf der Meinung ist, dass es jetzt reicht für die Nacht, stört mich nichts so sehr wie meine nach unten verrutschte Bettdecke. Der lose Bezug am oberen Rand kitzelt mich und an den Füßen habe ich einen dicken und schweren Knubbel, der nervt. Ich habe schon so eine Art Druckknopf gefunden, mit dem sich die Decke von außen im Bezug fixieren lässt. Aber die Dinger an allen vier Ecken sind nicht so richtig angenehm und funktionieren auch nur leidlich. Abgesehen von einem Schlafsack fällt mir nicht mehr viel ein. Habt ihr andere Vorschläge? Decken zum Beispiel, die sich gut ohne Bezug nutzen lassen und relativ bequem zu reinigen sind?

The BBC news article could start with:

British Prime Minister Tony Blair and his opponent, Conservative leader Michael Howard, clashed yesterday over who would raise taxes less. The debate, hosted by the BBC, was the first head-to-head between the two parties' leaders in this general election campaign. Mr Blair insisted the Conservative Party would raise taxes and made a pledge that he would not increase taxes on fuel, pensions, or the minimum wage if re-elected. 

But Mr Howard accused the prime minister of "trickery" and said he would raise taxes by ending Mr Blair's system of tax credits. 

The pair also clashed over the war in Iraq, with Mr Blair defending his decision to join the American-led invasion in 2003.

1 (2 lb) spaghetti squash
1 (8 ounce) package Baby Spinach
1/2 cup panko breadcrumbs (Japanese breadcrumbs)
2 tablespoons grated fresh parmesan cheese
1 tablespoon minced garlic
1/2 teaspoon fresh ground black pepper
1/4 teaspoon baking powder
2 large egg whites
sriracha mayonnaise
1 tablespoon olive oil, divided
5 teaspoons canola mayonnaise
2 teaspoons 2% low-fat milk
1 teaspoon sriracha sauce (hot chile sauce, such as Huy Fong)
1 teaspoon cider vinegar
1. Cut squash in half lengthwise. Scoop out seeds; discard. Place squash halves, cut sides up, in a microwave-safe bowl. Cover with a damp paper towel. Microwave at HIGH 20 minutes or until tender. Let stand 10 minutes. Scrape inside of squash with a fork to remove spaghettilike strands to measure 4 cups. 2. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add spinach to pan; cook 2 minutes or until spinach wilts. Place squash and spinach on a clean dish towel; squeeze until barely moist. Coarsely chop squash mixture, and place in a large bowl. Add panko and next 4 ingredients (through baking powder), and toss well to combine. Place egg whites in a medium bowl; beat with a mixer at high speed until soft peaks form. Gently fold egg whites into squash mixture. 3. Fill a 1/4-cup dry measuring cup with squash mixture. Invert onto work surface; gently pat into a 3/4-inch-thick patty. Repeat procedure with remaining squash mixture, forming 10 patties total. Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add 1 1/2 teaspoons oil to pan, and swirl to coat. Add 5 patties to pan; cook 3 minutes on each side or until browned. Remove patties from pan; keep warm. Repeat the procedure with remaining 1 1/2 teaspoons oil and squash patties. 4. Combine mayonnaise and remaining ingredients in a small bowl. Serve with fritters.

T​h​e​ ​w​e​a​k​ ​d​o​l​l​a​r​ ​i​s​ ​h​i​t​t​i​n​g​ ​R​e​u​t​e​r​s​,​ ​t​h​e​ ​f​i​n​a​n​c​i​a​l​ ​i​n​f​o​r​m​a​t​i​o​n​ ​p​r​o​v​i​d​e​r​ ​a​n​d​ ​m​e​d​i​a​ ​c​o​m​p​a​n​y​.​ ​B​e​c​a​u​s​e​ ​R​e​u​t​e​r​s​ ​m​a​k​e​s​ ​m​o​s​t​ ​o​f​ ​i​t​s​ ​s​a​l​e​s​ ​i​n​ ​d​o​l​l​a​r​s​,​ ​b​u​t​ ​b​i​l​l​s​ ​i​t​s​ ​e​x​p​e​n​s​e​s​ ​i​n​ ​p​o​u​n​d​s​,​ ​t​h​e​ ​d​o​l​l​a​r​'​s​ ​d​e​c​l​i​n​e​ ​a​g​a​i​n​s​t​ ​t​h​e​ ​p​o​u​n​d​ ​h​a​s​ ​l​e​d​ ​t​o​ ​a​ ​d​e​c​l​i​n​e​ ​i​n​ ​R​e​u​t​e​r​s​'​s​ ​p​r​o​f​i​t​s​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​c​o​m​p​a​n​y​ ​h​a​s​ ​r​e​s​p​o​n​d​e​d​ ​b​y​ ​c​u​t​t​i​n​g​ ​c​o​s​t​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​l​a​y​i​n​g​ ​o​f​f​ ​e​m​p​l​o​y​e​e​s​.​ ​I​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​f​i​r​s​t​ ​h​a​l​f​ ​o​f​ ​t​h​e​ ​y​e​a​r​,​ ​R​e​u​t​e​r​s​'​s​ ​p​r​o​f​i​t​s​ ​f​e​l​l​ ​b​y​ ​2​3​ ​p​e​r​c​e​n​t​,​ ​a​n​d​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​o​m​p​a​n​y​ ​e​x​p​e​c​t​s​ ​i​t​s​ ​f​u​l​l​-​y​e​a​r​ ​p​r​o​f​i​t​s​ ​t​o​ ​f​a​l​l​ ​b​y​ ​a​s​ ​m​u​c​h​ ​a​s​ ​1​0​ ​p​e​r​c​e​n​t​.​ ​"​W​e​ ​a​r​e​ ​n​o​t​ ​i​m​m​u​n​e​ ​t​o​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​h​a​l​l​e​n​g​e​s​ ​f​a​c​i​n​g​ ​t​h​e​ ​g​l​o​b​a​l​ ​e​c​o​n​o​m​y​,​"​ ​s​a​i​d​ ​M​i​c​h​a​e​l​ ​F​r​i​e​d​e​n​b​e​r​g​,​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​o​m​p​a​n​y​'​s​ ​c​h​i​e​f​ ​e​x​e​c​u​t​i​v​e​.​

In this paper, we propose deep learning algorithms for ranking response
surfaces, with applications to optimal stopping problems in financial
mathematics. The problem of ranking response surfaces is motivated by
estimating optimal feedback policy maps in stochastic control problems, aiming
to efficiently find index associated to the minimal response across the
entire continuous input space $\mathcal{X} \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$. By
considering points in $\mathcal{X}$ as pixels and indices of the minimal
surfaces as labels, we recast problem as an image segmentation problem,
which assigns a label to every pixel in an image such that pixels with same
label share certain characteristics. This provides an alternative method for
efficiently solving problem instead of using sequential design in our
previous work [R. Hu and M. Ludkovski, SIAM/ASA Journal on Uncertainty
Quantification, 5 (2017), 212--239].
  Deep learning algorithms are scalable, parallel and model-free, i.e., no
parametric assumptions needed on the response surfaces. Considering ranking
response surfaces as image segmentation allows one to use broad class of deep
neural networks, e.g., UNet, SegNet, DeconvNet, which have been widely applied
and numerically proved to possess high accuracy in field. We also
systematically study dependence of deep learning algorithms on input
data generated on uniform grids or by sequential design sampling, and observe
that the performance of deep learning is {\it not} sensitive to the noise and
locations (close to/away from boundaries) of training data. We present few
examples including synthetic ones and the Bermudan option pricing problem to
show efficiency and accuracy of this method.

Davos delegates face a crowded agenda this year with climate and pandemic emergencies competing for their attention.

For the first time since the pandemic began, the annual meeting of the World Economic Forum (WEF) is being held face-to-face.

Organisers said they expect more than 2,000 politicians, buisness leaders and journalists to attend the event in the Swiss ski resort this week.

As well as focusing on Russia's invasion of Ukraine, the meeting will look at how climate plans have been affected by the cost of living crisis.

With the pandemic largely moving into an endemic stage, delegates face a twin challenge of tackling the huge disruption Covid-19 has caused, while taking steps to decarbonise in line with the goals of the Paris Agreement.

This year's meeting will also examine the role of buisness in promoting sustainable and inclusive economic growth, while addressing the vulnerabilities that have been exposed by the pandemic and other global crises.

The UIC–Halsted station is a train station in Chicago, Illinois, serving the Blue Line of the Chicago Transit Authority's 'L' system. It is located at 333 W. Halsted Street in the Near West Side neighborhood.

The station was built in 1895 as part of the Metropolitan West Side Elevated Railroad. It was designed in a Victorian architectural style and features a limestone facade, stained glass windows, and an elevated platform. The station was originally named Halsted Street, but was renamed in 2011 to reflect its proximity to the University of Illinois at Chicago.

The station is a major hub for the CTA, serving over 1.5 million passengers per year. It is also a stop for several bus routes, including the #8 Halsted and the #60 Blue Island/26th.

The station has been the site of several crimes, including a shooting in 2013 that left two people dead and several others injured. The station has also been the site of protests and demonstrations, including a protest against police brutality in 2020.

The station is undergoing a renovation project, which includes the installation of new elevators and the replacement of the station's tracks and platforms. The project is expected to be completed in late 2023.

The silver dish is what your family gives you, your father makes it and your mother polishes it and then you are given what you need to live on, the fruits, bread, meat and water you need to make your way in life, as they begin to send you away and when they finally leave you, as they must in this world where life and death go on without you, and you find yourself still able to think and enjoy and run and stop and rest and run and walk and stretch and reach out for what remains of it all, then the silver dish has nothing left, it is all eaten, and you begin to worry that what was there is no longer there, that life has passed, that death bites like a snake, a mad dog, and you despise the silver dish and the lasting effects it has had on you, the way it has made you unthinking and unthinking, lukewarm and unable to grow your own trees and eat their fruit, or herd your own goats and eat their flesh, or live your own life and be strong enough to face the darkness that comes when you would still like to play, it is not yet too late, take the dish and throw it away, bury it, because someone else may take it and succumb to its glittering, glittering charm, the light that almost killed you.

The novel kicks off with a vampiric woman, Tanya, attacking a group of people at a club. it turns out that she is the mother Of the protagonist, named on the novel as "E". E and her single mother, Sarah, move around a lot, having to move From place to place after mom sets up an "accident" in their home that requires they move. In this new town, Bullpen, Missouri, E has A hard Time making friends, partially due to moving around a lot and also because she is embarrassed by her mother who requires feeding on human blood. E has a crush on a boy at school, and through a series of misunderstandings, comes to the conclusion that he is part of a vampire hunting clan. The story follows E as she deals With being an outcast at school And navigating her mother's behavior, eventually coming to a head at the local YMCA Halloween dance.

In the novel, the world is facing a crisis of ecological ruin, and the protagonist, a scientist named Dr. Rachel Waters, is working to develop a solution. However, she soon finds herself up against a powerful corporation that is trying to stop her. The corporation's CEO, a man named Mr. Taylor, is afraid of the potential impact of Dr. Waters' technology on his business, and he will do anything to stop her. She must fight for what she believes in, even as her own life and the future of the planet hang in the balance.

Darrick E. Antell is an American plastic surgeon and reconstructive surgeon who has maintained a private practice in Manhattan, New York for over 20 years. Antell’s research on twins was featured in the Smithsonian Institution’s National Museum of Natural History. 

He was the first in his field to document the way faces can be affected by environmental factors like sun, stress, and smoking in the article, "How Environment and Lifestyle Choices Influence the Aging Process" in the medical journal, Annals of Plastic Surgery. 

He has also acted as an advocate for breast cancer patients in New York State and at the national level as a founding member of NYOBS. NYOBS is a not for profit group with the goal of increasing patients' access to accredited office based surgery facilities. Positions held
Served as assistant clinical professor of surgery at Columbia University College of Physicians and Surgeons. Antell has been a clinical faculty member and guest lecturer at American University of Antigua since 2010. 

Antell has been the assistant clinical professor of surgery at the Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai since 2014.

I really like the „new“ part of woods. You have some spots to loot  and some Scav spawns. It’s pretty quiet  PvP wise  but you    still can find stuff. I hate the „old“ part   of woods.
